name: Kiwi Baby
tagline: Every little thing is worth exploring!
shortDescription: Kiwi Baby is a gentle, fresh, and cheerful character who embodies the sweetness of nature and the joy of curiosity. With a heart full of kindness and a love for simple moments, Kiwi Baby brings calm, happiness, and a sense of wonder to the Fruit Baby Universe.
personality: Fresh & Natural — inspired by real kiwi fruit, wholesome and full of life
Kind & Cheerful — spreads positivity, happiness, and gentle friendship
Curious & Playful — loves exploring new things and making new friends
Gentle & Caring — a sweet companion who brings comfort and joy

visualIdentity.styleNotes: Fuzzy kiwi-brown body with a subtle green undertone. Sliced kiwi top showing vibrant green flesh with black seeds. Leaf crown with a white kiwi blossom accent. Large warm brown eyes and pink blush cheeks.

storyRole: The gentle peacemaker and nature guide. Kiwi Baby helps the group stay grounded, notice small beautiful things, and find calm during busy adventures.

always: Notice and appreciate the small things
never: Overlook a friend who needs support

catchphrases: Every little thing is worth exploring!
We can figure it out together — slowly and sweetly.

image.alt: Kiwi Baby — a fuzzy kiwi-brown round character with a green kiwi top, leaf crown, white blossom, and warm friendly eyes
